---
title: "About Me"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Hi, I'm Ananya Mahadeva {.text-right}

![Profile](image/ananya.png){fig-alt="Ananya Mahadeva" width=200px style="border-radius: 50%; border: 4px solid #c59d5f; float: right; margin-left: 20px;"}

I am a Business Analytics postgraduate student at a leading Dublin university, with a strong passion for data-driven decision making. My academic and professional background spans data analysis, machine learning, and business intelligence.

My journey reflects a strong transition from traditional work environments — like food service and retail — to a data-focused analytical career. I believe diverse experience makes a better analyst.

I am deeply passionate about working with data to uncover patterns and tell compelling stories that drive smart decisions.

---

## Professional Experience {.text-left}

### Christmas Market Food Service — RDS Stadium, Dublin
**Role:** Food Service Assistant | *Dec 2024*

- Delivered fast-paced customer service in a high-volume event environment
- Maintained HACCP food safety standards throughout service
- Collaborated with team members to optimise order processing speed

### Deli Assistant — Dublin
**Role:** Deli Counter Assistant | *2023–2024*

- Prepared and served deli products to strict hygiene and quality standards
- Managed stock rotation and inventory reporting
- Built strong rapport with regular customers

---

## Education {.text-right}

### MSc Business Analytics
**University, Dublin** | *2024–2025*

Key modules include:
- Predictive Analytics & Machine Learning
- Data Visualisation with Power BI
- Statistical Methods for Business
- ePortfolio & Professional Development

### Prior Education
Bachelor's Degree in Commerce/Business (India)

---

## Technical Skills {.text-left}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

**Programming & Analysis**

- Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)
- SQL & Database Querying
- Microsoft Excel (Advanced)
- Power BI Dashboard Development

**Web & DevOps**

- Quarto Website Development
- Git & GitHub Version Control
- GitHub Pages Deployment
- SCSS / CSS Styling

:::

---

## Personal Goals {.text-right}

> "Data is the new oil, but insight is the fuel." — My guiding principle

- Secure a graduate-level data analytics role in Ireland
- Contribute to open-source data projects
- Continue building and maintaining this professional portfolio
- Achieve AZ-900 Azure Fundamentals certification

---

## Outside Work {.text-left}

When I'm not analysing data, I enjoy:

- Exploring Dublin's tech and innovation scene
- Visual design and diagram creation
- Learning about machine learning advances
- Following career development best practices
